# telemetry_query internal helpers (referenced by tests via mock.patch)
_aggregate_skill_sessions(records: List[Dict[str, Any]], skill_name: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_build_time_where(since: str | None, until: str | None, params: Dict[str, Any], timestamp_field: str = 'timestamp') -> str
_duckdb_query_corrections(filepath: pathlib.Path, *, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_duckdb_query_file(filepath: pathlib.Path, *, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None, timestamp_field: str = 'timestamp') -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_duckdb_query_workflows(filepath: pathlib.Path, *, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_duckdb_skill_counts(filepath: pathlib.Path, *, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, min_count: int = 1) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_filter_by_project(records: List[Dict[str, Any]], project: str | None, include_unknown: bool = False, *, alias_aware: bool = False) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_filter_by_time(records: List[Dict[str, Any]], since: str | None, until: str | None, timestamp_field: str = 'timestamp') -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_filter_corrections_by_project(records: List[Dict[str, Any]], project: str | None, include_unknown: bool = False) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_load_jsonl(filepath: pathlib.Path) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_parse_ts(ts_str: str) -> datetime.datetime | None
_query_sessions_via_store(*, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
_warn_no_duckdb() -> None
